# Matt Marcotte

> Matt Marcotte is a screen-printing and DTF (direct-to-film) industry veteran and operations strategist. He is the founder of DTF.STREAM and ScreenPrintGPT and the creator of Free Gang Sheet Maker. He helps print shops scale into efficient, profitable businesses and builds the software they use.

## Key facts
- Site: https://marcotte.ink/
- Role: operations strategist, founder, and builder in the screen-printing & DTF industry
- 15+ years in print & apparel; has helped shops scale up to $30M/year and led teams of 100+
- Founder of DTF.STREAM (https://dtf.stream/) and ScreenPrintGPT (https://screenprintgpt.com/)
- Creator of Free Gang Sheet Maker (https://freegangsheetmaker.com/)
- Writes on screen printing, halftones, ink, shop operations, and DTF

## What he does
- Consulting and operations strategy for print shops (SOPs, systems, software integration)
- Builds software/tools for print shops
- Publishes practical screen-printing and DTF guidance

## Pages
- [Home](https://marcotte.ink/): bio, ventures, free resources, and consulting
- [Blog](https://marcotte.ink/blog): screen-printing know-how, shop solutions, and industry interviews
